MODULE: cosmos.dns.dns_manager
FILE: cosmos/dns/dns_manager.py (821 lines)
CATEGORY: dns

DESCRIPTION: cosmos DNS Manager

"I've conquered DNS! Now I control what names mean what!"

Multi-provider DNS management with support for all record types including MX.

CLASSES:
- DNSRecordType(Enum): DNS record types.
- DNSRecord: DNS record definition.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- DNSZone: DNS zone definition.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- DNSProvider(ABC): Abstract DNS provider interface.
  Methods: async def list_zones(self) -> List[DNSZone]
  Methods: async def get_zone(self, zone_id: str) -> Optional[DNSZone]
  Methods: async def list_records(self, zone_id: str, record_type: DNSRecordType=None) -> List[DNSRecord]
  Methods: async def create_record(self, zone_id: str, record: DNSRecord) -> Optional[DNSRecord]
  Methods: async def update_record(self, zone_id: str, record_id: str, record: DNSRecord) -> Optional[DNSRecord
  Methods: async def delete_record(self, zone_id: str, record_id: str) -> bool
- CloudflareDNSProvider(DNSProvider): Cloudflare DNS provider implementation.
  Methods: async def list_zones(self) -> List[DNSZone]
  Methods: async def get_zone(self, zone_id: str) -> Optional[DNSZone]
  Methods: async def list_records(self, zone_id: str, record_type: DNSRecordType=None) -> List[DNSRecord]
  Methods: async def create_record(self, zone_id: str, record: DNSRecord) -> Optional[DNSRecord]
  Methods: async def update_record(self, zone_id: str, record_id: str, record: DNSRecord) -> Optional[DNSRecord
  Methods: async def delete_record(self, zone_id: str, record_id: str) -> bool
- Route53DNSProvider(DNSProvider): AWS Route 53 DNS provider implementation.
  Methods: async def list_zones(self) -> List[DNSZone]
  Methods: async def get_zone(self, zone_id: str) -> Optional[DNSZone]
  Methods: async def list_records(self, zone_id: str, record_type: DNSRecordType=None) -> List[DNSRecord]
  Methods: async def create_record(self, zone_id: str, record: DNSRecord) -> Optional[DNSRecord]
  Methods: async def update_record(self, zone_id: str, record_id: str, record: DNSRecord) -> Optional[DNSRecord
  Methods: async def delete_record(self, zone_id: str, record_id: str) -> bool
- DNSManager: Multi-provider DNS management for cosmos.

Features:
- Cloudflare, Route 53, Azu
  Methods: def get_provider(self, name: str) -> Optional[DNSProvider]
  Methods: def list_providers(self) -> List[str]
  Methods: async def list_all_zones(self) -> Dict[str, List[DNSZone]]
  Methods: async def find_zone(self, domain: str) -> Optional[tuple]
  Methods: async def get_mx_records(self, provider: str, zone_id: str) -> List[DNSRecord]
  Methods: async def set_mx_records(self, provider: str, zone_id: str, mx_servers: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> boo
  Methods: async def configure_email_dns(self, provider: str, zone_id: str, email_provider: str, domain: str=No
  Methods: async def add_dkim_record(self,
